name: trade-analysis
description: Annotated Polymarket fills for a market + time window with authoritative on-chain maker/taker role and real fee. Ask in plain English ("who traded around this goal?") and get a CSV plus an optional visualization.

falcon_api_key.title: Falcon API Key
falcon_api_key.description: Falcon API key for Polymarket trade data.

polygon_rpc_url.title: Polygon RPC URL
polygon_rpc_url.description: Polygon RPC endpoint for on-chain role/fee decoding.
